markdown:
#  Budget And Forecast Snapshots User Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  View a Snapshot 
There are different ways to view snapshots in the Budget tool.
### View a Project Status Snapshot from the Project Status Snapshots Tab
Any user can view a project status snapshot tab from this tab. Ad-hoc snapshots are not saved and do not appear in this tab.
  1. Navigate to the Project level **Budget** tool.
  2. Click the **Project Status Snapshots** tab.
  3. In the **Name** column, click the snapshot to open.
  4. The system opens the snapshot in your web browser. A **Viewing from Snapshot** banner appears. 
![Viewing From Snapshot Callout](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/da7d92c7298a4e91e994a19fa4b934a4/56b11f346d740aa23cbac8dafbb943d9/viewing-from-snapshot-callout.png?fm=webp)
  5. Click the **View Current Data** button to return to your project's current budget data


### View a Project Status Snapshot from the Project Status Snapshots Tab
Any user can view a project status snapshot tab from this tab. Ad-hoc snapshots are not saved and do not appear in this tab.
  1. Navigate to the Project level **Budget** tool.
  2. Click the **Project Status Snapshots** tab.
  3. In the **Name** column, click the snapshot to open.
  4. The system opens the snapshot in your web browser. A **Viewing from Snapshot** banner appears. 
![Viewing From Snapshot Callout](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/da7d92c7298a4e91e994a19fa4b934a4/56b11f346d740aa23cbac8dafbb943d9/viewing-from-snapshot-callout.png?fm=webp)
  5. Click the **View Current Data** button to return to your project's current budget data.


### View a Project Status Snapshots as the Snapshot Creator
Snapshot creators can also view a snapshot immediately after it's created.
  1. Complete the steps in [Create a Budget Snapshot](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/budget-and-forecast-snapshots-user-guide/create-a-snapshot). When saved, the **Snapshot Created** banner displays. 
![View Snapshot Data](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5a62a2aaea1f8f065431b60c024880b1/d8f207cfa70f228361825a2099808bff/view-snapshot-data.png?fm=webp)
  2. Click **View Snapshot Data**.
  3. The label on the banner changes to **Viewing from Snapshot**.
  4. Review the snapshot as needed.
  5. Click the **View Current Data** button to return to your project's current budget data.


### View an Ad-Hoc Snapshot as the Snapshots Creator
Ad Hoc snapshots can only be viewed after creation. Only project status snapshots are saved.
  1. Complete the steps for an ad-hoc snapshot in [Create a Budget Snapshot](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/budget-and-forecast-snapshots-user-guide/create-a-snapshot).   
When saved, the Snapshot Created banner displays. 
![Ad Hoc Snapshot Created](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5511d5cfa52fafe2f1e77a6fc61cf3a5/5436c5f3b61693ccb7ef6e4e409313cf/ad-hoc-snapshot-created.png?fm=webp)
  2. Click **View Snapshot Data**.
  3. _(Optional)_ See [Export a Budget Snapshot](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/budget-and-forecast-snapshots-user-guide/export-a-snapshot) if you want to save it. 
#####  Important
Ad-hoc snapshots aren't saved after the current session. You must export it if you want to see it later.
  4. Click the **View Current Data** button to return to your project's current budget data.
